arts.ttl: Revealed: How Man Utd Want to Pay Wolves for PSG, Forest-Targeted Forward
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers locked in Matheus Cunha on a long-term deal during the winter transfer window, fending off interest from several clubs at the time. Still, despite that show of commitment, speculation about his future hasn’t gone away—and now, Manchester United are being linked with a potential move following months of rumors. arts.ttl: Tottenham, Man City Pose Serious Threat to PSG for €45M-Rated Lazio Standout
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have quietly reshaped their center-back group over the past year, bringing in Lucas Beraldo and Willian Pacho. With summer approaching, it wouldn’t be surprising if the club looked to add another young piece to the mix. Marquinhos, Presnel Kimpembe, and Lucas Hernandez remain important figures, but there are lingering concerns. arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd Still Face €80M Price for Leipzig Standout With PSG Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain took a short-term approach last year by loaning Xavi Simons back to RB Leipzig. Recently, things became more settled when Simons officially made the move permanent. That might actually work out in PSG’s favor. arts.ttl: Man Utd Willing to Include Rasmus Højlund in Deal for £63M-Rated Chelsea, PSG Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have had their eye on Victor Osimhen for a while, and with the summer transfer window on the horizon, speculation around his next move is picking up steam. Now at Galatasaray, the Nigerian striker has rediscovered the kind of form that made him one of Europe’s hottest properties during the 2022-23 season. arts.ttl: Chelsea Begin Talks With €80M-Rated Liverpool Target’s Agent as PSG Hold Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are closely watching Hugo Ekitike’s potential move to Eintracht Frankfurt, with a 20 percent sell-on clause in place that could give them a nice financial bump if the transfer goes through. Newcastle are still interested in Ekitike as a possible replacement for Alexander Isak. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: 'It's always difficult to play away from home'
arts.sum: The Paris Saint-Germain coach and João Neves spoke to PSG TV after the Rouge et Bleu's draw against FC Nantes on Tuesday evening at the Stade de la Beaujoire (1–1), as part of the rescheduled Matchday 29 of Ligue 1. I’m very happy to be part of this Paris Saint-Germain team that holds the record of 39 unbeaten away games.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Crystal Palace can help Arsenal lock down counter kings PSG in the Champions League
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Mikel Arteta knows he cannot afford to look past Crystal Palace while the minds of many Gunners fans are already on the Champions League and PSG next week.

arts.ttl: Arteta will not rest players against Palace despite looming PSG tie
arts.sum: ‘When players are fit and available, they have to play’ Liverpool to be league winners if Arsenal lose to Palace Mikel Arteta will not shy away from selecting key Arsenal personnel to face Crystal Palace on Wednesday in their final game before next week’s Champions League semi-final first leg even though his team are playing for little beyond pride. The meagre prize on offer is delaying Liverpool’s title celebrations but the manager denied he could wrap members of his squad in cotton wool. “We cannot think in those terms,” Arteta said. “I think when the players are fit and they are available and they want to play, they have to play. They are at their best when they are playing and they have consistency in their performances.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes decision on Bukayo Saka's playing time as Arsenal prepare for Champions League semi-final showdown with PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says Bukayo Saka has revealed the decision he has made over star player Bukayo Saka's workload ahead of Arsenal's Champions League semi-final against PSG next week.

arts.ttl: PSG set new Europe’s Top 5 Leagues record following away draw to Nantes
arts.sum: PSG have set a new record across Europe’s Top 5 leagues this Tuesday on the back of their away draw to relegation-fighting Nantes. The contest between Antoine Kombouaré’s Les Canaris…
